_comment: Mutation testing for Twyne. Stryker has no native bun:test runner, so we use the command runner against `bun test`. coverageAnalysis must be 'off' for the command runner (it runs the whole command per mutant). The mutate/test scope is intentionally a focused set of pure, well-tested util modules with 1:1 test files so a full run is tractable and the score is meaningful; widen `mutate` (and the test command) as more units gain bun tests. ignorePatterns keeps the sandbox copy off symlinked/heavy dirs (.claude, build outputs). See `npm run test:mutation`.
_ignoreComment: Agent tool dirs (.claude/.crush/.factory/.pi/...) hold symlinked skill folders that break Stryker's sandbox file copy (EISDIR). Ignore every root dot-dir except none-needed, plus build outputs and generated code, so the sandbox stays small and copy-safe.
